name: Municipality of Calatrava
tagline: Serving the people of Calatrava with integrity, transparency, and progress.
heroSub: Access public services, stay informed on local news and ordinances, and connect with your local government — all in one place.

elgu.title: Online Services are here
elgu.text: Transact with the municipal government online — request documents, book appointments, and follow up on applications without lining up at the Municipal Hall.

quickServices.title: Civil Registry
quickServices.desc: Birth, marriage & death certificates and corrections.

quickServices.title: Business Permit
quickServices.desc: New permits, renewals, and barangay clearances.

quickServices.title: Health Services
quickServices.desc: Rural health unit, vaccinations, and assistance.

quickServices.title: Citizen Help Desk
quickServices.desc: Questions, requests, and feedback to the LGU.

programs.title: Universal Health Care Caravan
programs.desc: Free medical missions and check-ups rotating across all 7 barangays.

programs.title: Calatrava Livelihood Program
programs.desc: Skills training, starter kits, and support for local entrepreneurs and farmers.

programs.title: Farm-to-Market Roads
programs.desc: Ongoing road concreting connecting upland barangays to the town center.
